parameters.query: =SELECT id FROM campaign_activity WHERE metadata->>'smartlead_event_id' = '{{ $json.smartlead_event_id }}' LIMIT 1
=SELECT id, email, first_name, last_name, linkedin_url FROM contacts WHERE LOWER(email) = '{{ $('Map Event Types').first().json.to_email }}' LIMIT 1

WITH campaign_contact AS (
  SELECT cc.id as campaign_contact_id
  FROM campaign_contacts cc
  WHERE cc.contact_id = '{{ $json.contact_id }}'
    AND cc.campaign_id = 'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890'
  LIMIT 1
),
ensure_channel AS (
  INSERT INTO campaign_contact_channels (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id, status)
  SELECT 
    (SELECT campaign_contact_id FROM campaign_contact),
    'cc222222-3333-4444-5555-666677778888',
    'active'
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaign_contact)
  ON CONFLICT (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT campaign_contact_id FROM campaign_contact) as campaign_contact_id,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT id FROM ensure_channel),
    (SELECT ccc.id FROM campaign_contact_channels ccc 
     WHERE ccc.campaign_contact_id = (SELECT campaign_contact_id FROM campaign_contact)
       AND ccc.campaign_channel_id = 'cc222222-3333-4444-5555-666677778888')
  ) as campaign_contact_channel_id,
  'cc222222-3333-4444-5555-666677778888' as campaign_channel_id

=INSERT INTO campaign_activity (
  campaign_contact_id,
  campaign_channel_id,
  activity_type,
  channel,
  activity_at,
  metadata
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.campaign_contact_id }}',
  '{{ $json.campaign_channel_id }}',
  '{{ $json.mapped_activity_type }}',
  'smartlead',
  '{{ $json.event_timestamp }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    smartlead_event_id: $json.smartlead_event_id,
    sl_email_lead_id: $json.sl_email_lead_id,
    sequence_number: $json.sequence_number,
    subject: $json.subject,
    reply_category: $json.reply_category,
    link_clicked: $json.link_clicked,
    campaign_id: $json.campaign_id,
    campaign_name: $json.campaign_name
  }) }}'
)
RETURNING id

=UPDATE campaign_contact_channels
SET 
  status = 'active',
  current_message_code = 'S{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.sequence_number }}',
  current_message_sent_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_channel_id }}';

UPDATE campaign_contacts
SET 
  total_touches = total_touches + 1,
  first_touch_at = COALESCE(first_touch_at, '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}'),
  last_touch_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_id }}';

=UPDATE campaign_contact_channels
SET 
  last_email_opened_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  engagement_level = CASE 
    WHEN engagement_level = 'cold' THEN 'warm'
    ELSE engagement_level
  END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_channel_id }}';

UPDATE campaign_contacts
SET 
  last_touch_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  first_engagement_at = COALESCE(first_engagement_at, '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}'),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_id }}';

=UPDATE campaign_contact_channels
SET 
  last_email_clicked_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  engagement_level = CASE 
    WHEN engagement_level IN ('cold', 'warm') THEN 'engaged'
    ELSE engagement_level
  END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_channel_id }}';

UPDATE campaign_contacts
SET 
  last_touch_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  first_engagement_at = COALESCE(first_engagement_at, '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}'),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_id }}';

=UPDATE campaign_contact_channels
SET 
  has_replied = TRUE,
  replied_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  engagement_level = 'hot',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_channel_id }}';

UPDATE campaign_contacts
SET 
  last_touch_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  first_engagement_at = COALESCE(first_engagement_at, '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}'),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_id }}';

=UPDATE campaign_contact_channels
SET 
  status = 'paused',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_channel_id }}';

UPDATE contacts
SET 
  email_status = 'bounced',
  email_validation_result = 'invalid',
  email_validated_at = NOW(),
  email_validation_source = 'smartlead_bounce',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.contact_id }}';

UPDATE campaign_contacts
SET 
  last_touch_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_id }}';

=UPDATE campaign_contact_channels
SET 
  status = 'paused',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_channel_id }}';

UPDATE campaign_contacts
SET 
  status = 'opted_out',
  opted_out_at = NOW(),
  opt_out_reason = 'Unsubscribed via Smartlead',
  opt_out_channel = 'smartlead',
  last_touch_at = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.event_timestamp }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Campaign Context').first().json.campaign_contact_id }}';

=INSERT INTO campaign_activity (
  campaign_contact_id,
  campaign_channel_id,
  activity_type,
  channel,
  metadata
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.campaign_contact_id }}',
  '{{ $json.campaign_channel_id }}',
  'status_changed',
  'smartlead',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    old_category: $json.lead_category_old,
    new_category: $json.lead_category_new,
    trigger_event: $json.lead_category_trigger_event
  }) }}'
)

=SELECT assign_ghl_branch(
  '{{ $json.campaign_contact_id }}',
  'smartlead',
  '{{ $json.trigger_event }}'
) as assigned_branch

=SELECT handle_opt_out(
  '{{ $json.campaign_contact_id }}',
  'smartlead',
  '{{ $json.classification === "unsubscribe" ? "Requested removal via email reply" : "Not interested - replied" }}'
)

=UPDATE campaign_contact_channels
SET 
  reply_sentiment = '{{ $json.classification }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.campaign_contact_channel_id }}'

=SELECT assign_ghl_branch(
  '{{ $json.campaign_contact_id }}',
  'smartlead',
  '{{ $json.lead_category_trigger_event }}'
) as assigned_branch

=SELECT handle_opt_out(
  '{{ $('Process Lead Category').first().json.campaign_contact_id }}',
  'smartlead',
  'Lead category: {{ $('Process Lead Category').first().json.lead_category_new }}'
)

=UPDATE campaign_contact_channels
SET 
  status = 'paused',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE campaign_contact_id = '{{ $('Process Lead Category').first().json.campaign_contact_id }}'

=INSERT INTO campaign_activity (
  activity_type,
  channel,
  metadata
) VALUES (
  'webhook_error',
  'system',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    error: "Contact not found by email",
    email: $('Map Event Types').first().json.to_email,
    event_type: $('Map Event Types').first().json.event_type,
    smartlead_event_id: $('Map Event Types').first().json.smartlead_event_id
  }) }}'
)

=INSERT INTO campaign_activity (
  activity_type,
  channel,
  metadata
) VALUES (
  'webhook_error',
  'system',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    error: "No campaign context found",
    contact_id: $('Merge Contact Data').first().json.contact_id,
    email: $('Map Event Types').first().json.to_email,
    event_type: $('Map Event Types').first().json.event_type
  }) }}'
)
